title: Research Findings Submission
description: Metadata and summary of a researcher's completed findings document

plan_version.description: The approved plan version this findings document is based on

document_path.description: Path to the full research findings Markdown document

key_findings_summary.description: Top-line findings — one sentence each — for PM consumption

diagrams_produced.description: Titles of all Mermaid diagrams in the findings document

edge_cases_count.description: Total number of edge cases documented

competitors_analyzed.description: Names or descriptions of competitors analyzed

the_extra_edge.description: researcher_2 only: One sentence stating the unique differentiating opportunity identified

cross_consultations.description: CPO questions asked and answers received during research execution

open_questions.description: Questions research could not fully answer — for PM or CPO attention
